# QA Plan: Sprint 3

**Scope**: 9 stories across 4 systems (Hit Detection, Scene Management, Damage & Health, Enemy AI)
**Engine**: Unity 6000.3.11f1 (URP 17.3)

## Automated Tests Required

### HD-001: Hitbox/Hurtbox Registration & Faction System — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/HitDetection/TestHitDetectionRegistry.cs`
**What to test**:
- Register/Unregister for IHitbox and IHurtbox — count reflects correctly
- Faction check returns false for same-faction pairs (Player↔Player, Enemy↔Enemy)
- Faction check returns true for cross-faction pairs (Player↔Enemy, Enemy↔Player)
- Neutral faction collides with everyone
- Destroyed (null) hitboxes are skipped without exception
- Clear() removes all entries
- IHitbox.Start() calls Register, OnDestroy() calls Unregister
- Scene transition fires Clear()

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Duplicate Register (idempotency)
- Register before Registry exists (VContainer guarantee)
- DontDestroyOnLoad survival

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### HD-002: Hit Detection & Event Dispatch — Integration
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/HitDetection/TestHitEventDispatch.cs`
**What to test**:
- OnTriggerEnter between player hitbox and enemy hurtbox → HitEvent published with correct fields
- Enemy contact hitbox vs player hurtbox → HitEvent with enemy as attacker
- Same-faction collision → no HitEvent published
- Missing registry entry → no exception, no event
- HitEvent.Timestamp uses Time.time
- HitEvent.ContactPoint uses collision.contacts[0].point
- No damage is applied — publish only

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Multiple simultaneous collisions
- Collision frame timing

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit/integration tests

### HD-003: Per-Target Hit Cooldown — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/HitDetection/TestHitCooldown.cs`
**What to test**:
- First hit within 0.3s → HitEvent published
- Second hit within 0.3s → no HitEvent published
- Hit after 0.3s cooldown expires → HitEvent published again
- Cooldown configurable via HitCooldownConfig SO
- Stale entries cleaned up periodically (no memory leak)
- Different targets have independent cooldown timers
- No exception on first hit (no entry yet)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Fast-math: multiple RecordHit calls in same frame
- Destroyed hurtbox in tracker

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests

### SM-001: Scene Load/Unload Core — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/SceneManager/SceneManagerLoadCoreTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- HeroCamp maps to correct scene path with allowSceneActivation=false, SceneLoadStarted published
- InRun with zoneId loads correct zone scene, SceneLoadStarted published
- New request during active loading is buffered (queue depth 1, latest wins)
- Already-active scene → no-op, no SceneLoadStarted published

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Null/empty zoneId (deferred to SM-002)
- Missing scene (deferred to SM-002)

**Estimated test count**: ~4 unit tests

### SM-002: Error Handling & Safety — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/SceneManager/SceneManagerErrorHandlingTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Null/empty ZoneId → GetDefaultZoneScene() with warning
- Missing scene in BuildSettings → SceneLoadFailed + TransitionTo(Menu)
- 5 consecutive failures → halt all loading, fatal log
- Null SceneRegistrySO → safe disabled, no subscription

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Consecutive failure counter resets on success
- Menu scene failure during recovery

**Estimated test count**: ~4 unit tests

### SM-003: Activation & Completion Flow — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/SceneManager/SceneManagerActivationTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- AsyncOperation at 0.9 publishes SceneReadyToActivate, allowSceneActivation stays false
- ActivateScene() sets allowSceneActivation=true, activates in 1 frame
- 10s timeout → auto-activate with warning
- Load complete → SceneLoadComplete published
- Built-in fade fallback activates when no Loading/Transition System

**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests

### SM-004: Preloading & Edge Cases — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/SceneManager/SceneManagerPreloadEdgeTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Loading/Paused/Defeat/Victory → silent no-op
- PreloadZoneAsync cancelled by incoming GStateChange to different scene
- Preload completes → scene ready with allowSceneActivation=false
- Buffered pending request matching just-loaded scene → silently discarded

**Estimated test count**: ~4 unit tests

### DH-001: Damage & Health Core — Integration
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/Combat/DamageApplicationServiceTests.cs` + `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/Combat/HealthComponentTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- HealthComponent: TakeDamage reduces HP, fires OnDamageTaken
- HealthComponent: Heal clamps to MaxHP
- HealthComponent: Kill sets HP=0, fires OnDeath
- DamageApplicationService: HitEvent → faction check → TakeDamage → DamageAppliedEvent
- Same-faction hit → no damage, no events
- Entity dies → EntityDiedEvent published
- Dead entity → further hits ignored

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero damage hit
- Overflow damage (> MaxHP remaining)
- Heal on dead entity (no-op)

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### EA-001: Enemy AI (Basic Chase) — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/_TinyRift/Tests/EditMode/EnemyAI/EnemyChaseAITests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Player within detection range → Idle→Chase transition, movement toward player
- Within attack range → Chase→Attack transition, stop moving, fire
- Player leaves detection range for losePlayerTime → Chase→Idle
- Player exits attack range → Attack→Chase
- Config SO values used (no hardcoding)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Null player (destroyed)
- Multiple enemies tracking same player
- Distance exactly at boundary

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### HD-002: Hit Detection & Event Dispatch — Integration
**Verification method**: Playtest session
**Who must sign off**: qa-lead + lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip of enemy hit registration in-game

Checklist:
- [ ] Player projectile hitbox hits enemy hurtbox → hit registers (no visual feedback yet, but log confirms)
- [ ] Enemy contact damage hits player → hit registers
- [ ] Player projectile passes through another player → no friendly fire
- [ ] Collider with no registration → no error in console

### SM-001: Scene Load/Unload Core — Logic
**Verification method**: Manual step-through
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer

Checklist:
- [ ] HeroCamp scene loads on GState→HeroCamp
- [ ] Zone scene loads on GState→InRun with zoneId
- [ ] Loading screen visible during load (allowSceneActivation=false works)

### SM-003: Activation & Completion Flow — Logic
**Verification method**: Manual step-through
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer

Checklist:
- [ ] Scene activates when loading completes
- [ ] Fade to black before activation, fade in after
- [ ] 10s timeout safety net works (simulate stuck loading)

### DH-001: Damage & Health Core — Integration
**Verification method**: Playtest session
**Who must sign off**: designer + qa-lead
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip of enemy taking damage and dying

Checklist:
- [ ] Enemy takes damage from player projectile
- [ ] Enemy dies at 0 HP
- [ ] Player takes damage from enemy contact
- [ ] No friendly fire between allies

### EA-001: Enemy AI (Basic Chase) — Logic
**Verification method**: Playtest session
**Who must sign off**: designer
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip of enemy chase behavior

Checklist:
- [ ] Enemy detects and chases player within range
- [ ] Enemy attacks when close enough
- [ ] Enemy returns to idle when player leaves range
- [ ] No jittering at range boundaries

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. HeroCamp scene loads from main menu
3. Player entity spawns and can move
4. Enemy spawns and chases player (EA-001)
5. Player projectile hits enemy → enemy takes damage → enemy dies (HD-001 + HD-002 + DH-001)
6. No friendly fire between player projectiles and player
7. Scene transitions complete without error (SM-001 + SM-003)
8. No console errors (exceptions, null refs, missing components)

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| HD-002 | Validate hit registration feels responsive — no missed hits, no double-hits | 1 | experienced |
| DH-001 | Validate damage numbers feel correct — enemies die in expected number of hits | 1 | designer |
| EA-001 | Validate chase AI feels fair — enemies react quickly enough, not too aggressive | 1 | new player |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-3-*.md` and reviewed by the designer before stories can be marked COMPLETE.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
